zh.Kerry, Toward Cowal, Argyll, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾堂亞德
zh.Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾分南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont於1330年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾分南時，他的父親John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont41歲，母親Joan Campbell36歲。他於1370年之前與Christina Munn在蘇格蘭阿吉爾堂亞德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1385年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾堂亞德享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾堂亞德。

zh-hans.Kerry, Toward Cowal, Argyll, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾堂亞德
zh-hans.Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾分南
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont于1330年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾分南时，他的父亲John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont41岁，母亲Joan Campbell36岁。他于1370年之前与Christina Munn在苏格兰阿吉爾堂亞德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1385年在苏格兰阿吉爾堂亞德享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾堂亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Lamont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: from the medieval personal name Lagman, which is from Old Norse Lǫgmathr, composed of the elements lǫg, plural of lag ‘law’ (from leggja ‘to lay down’), + mathr ‘man’ (genitive manns).
French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', from any of the places called Amont, in Haute-Saône and Haute-Vienne.
Altered form of French   Lamothe  .

variants.name: McClammy
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from a pet form of   Lamont  .

variants.name: McClymont
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Laomuinn ‘son of Laomann’, a personal name borrowed from Old Norse and meaning ‘law giver’. See Lamont .

variants.name: Lemond
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .
French: variant of Lemonde, a nickname from Old French monde ‘pure’, with fused masculine definite article le.
French (Lémond): variant of Laymond, itself a variant, with fused definite article l', of Aymond .

variants.name: Lemont
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .
French: habitational name from Le Mont in the Vosges or possibly other minor places so named from Old French mont ‘mountain’. Alternatively, a variant of Lemond 2.

variants.name: Lemonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Lamont , with English excrescent -s.

variants.name: Lawman
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lamont  .

English: occupational name from Middle English lagman, lagheman ‘law-man, one whose duty is to declare the law; lawyer’ (Old Norse lagmann-, lǫgmann-, oblique case of lǫgmathr). The word was also widely used as a personal name, Middle English Lagman, Lagheman.

variants.name: Lamond
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and French: variant of   Lamont  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Lamothe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Donat, Francois, Lucien, Odette, Adrien, Andree, Armand, Armande.
French: variant of   Lamotte  , or a habitational name from any of the places in France named Lamothe or La Mothe.

History: The settlement that became the city of Detroit was founded in 1701 by Antoine de la Mothe, Sieur de Cadillac (1658–1730), governor of LA. He was born into the minor nobility in Gascony, France, where his father owned the seigneury of Cadillac.

variants.name: Lamonte
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont was born in 1330, in Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland, his father, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, was 41 and his mother, Joan Campbell, was 36. He married Christina Munn before 1370, in Toward, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1385, in Toward, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Toward, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont est né en 1330, à Kilfinan, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Campbell, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Christina Munn avant 1370, à Toward, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1385, à Toward, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Toward, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont 1330 in Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont 41 und seine Mutter Joan Campbell 36. Er hat vor 1370 in Toward, Argyll, Scotland Christina Munn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1385 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Toward, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Toward, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont è nato il nel 1330 nel Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Joan Campbell, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Christina Munn prima del 1370, nel Toward, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1385, nel Toward, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Toward, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamontが1330年にスコットランドアルグイルキルフィナンで生まれた時，父John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamontは41歳，母Joan Campbellは36歳であった。1370年以前にスコットランドアルグイルトワードでChristina Munnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1385年にスコットランドアルグイルトワードで55歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルトワードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont(이)가 1330년 스컷랜드 아그이 킬핀아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Campbell(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1370년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이 타워드에서 Christina Munn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 스컷랜드 아그이 타워드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 타워드에 묻혔다.

mn.Kerry, Toward Cowal, Argyll, Scotland: Toward, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont nasceu em 1330, em Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Campbell, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina Munn antes 1370, em Toward, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1385, em Toward, Argyll, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Toward, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont родился в 1330 г. в местности килфинан, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Campbell, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina Munn перед 1370 г. в местности тоуард, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1385 г. в местности тоуард, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности тоуард, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont nació en 1330, en Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan Campbell, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Christina Munn antes de 1370, en Toward, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1385, en Toward, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Toward, Argyll, Scotland.
